description: Logan (Infantry) + Mia (Lancer) + Zinman (Marksman) full 3-hero combo — all three are minxxx-only heroes. Logan buffs infantry defense (deterministic); Mia buffs lancer attack with 50% chance S2 splash; Zinman buffs marksman attack (deterministic). Tests all-class coverage with minxxx-exclusive lineup. RNG due to Mia S2 — run 5 battles.
